title: Strawberry Floral Dessert
description: A sweet dessert made with fresh strawberries and a floral twist.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix together strawberries and floral in a bowl until well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix together sugar and a pinch of salt.
Add the sugar mixture to the strawberry mixture and stir until dissolved.
Spoon the mixture onto the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the mixture is lightly caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
